title: 'Lips Started Swelling...': Woman Alleges After Eating Vande Bharat Food; IRCTC Replies To Viral Post
description: A female passenger has alleged that she suffered "severe" allergy reaction after consuming the lunch served on Vande Bharat while travelling from Varanasi to Deoghar. Her viral post reignited concerns over the quality and hygiene of food served by Indian Railways. It also sparked a probe by IRCTC.
